name: AWARE
description: Proof — configurable web app test observability dashboard

scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac' && node -e "const v=process.env.npm_config_user_agent.match(/pnpm\/(\d+\.\d+\.\d+)/); if(!v||v[1]!=='10.32.1'){console.error('Requires pnpm 10.32.1, got '+(v?v[1]:'unknown'));process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
